title: NHAI – Eminent External Professional – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NHAI Eminent External Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Eminent External Professional. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NHAI official website nhai.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Post Graduate Degree or Post Graduate Diploma in Transport Planning, Master’s Degree in Economics, Minimum 5 years relevant experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHAI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: National Highways Authority of India Eminent External Professional (Transport Planner)
